queries: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries FROM events;

case.question: Сколько раз кормили грудью за всё время?

response.answer: За всё время кормили грудью 143 раза.

queries:
WITH feedings AS (
  SELECT occurred_at,
         LAG(occurred_at) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS prev_at
  FROM events
  WHERE type = 'feed_breast'
),
sessions AS (
  SELECT occurred_at,
         SUM(CASE WHEN prev_at IS NULL OR occurred_at - prev_at > INTERVAL '30 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
           OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS session_id
  FROM feedings
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS feeding_count FROM sessions;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM events WHERE DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') = '2026-05-10'

case.question: Сколько всего записей было за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026?

response.answer: За неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026 было всего 40 записей.

queries: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries FROM events WHERE occurred_at >= '2026-05-10 21:00:00+00' AND occurred_at < '2026-05-17 00:00:00+03';

case.question: Покажи статистику количества записей по дням за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026.

response.answer: За неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026 было записано события только за 11 мая, количество которых составляет 40. Данных за остальные дни недели нет.

queries: SELECT DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM events WHERE occurred_at >= '2026-05-11 00:00:00+03' AND occurred_at < '2026-05-18 00:00:00+03' GROUP BY local_day ORDER BY local_day;

case.question: В среднем сколько записей в день было за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026? Округли до целого.

response.answer: В среднем за день с 11 по 17 мая 2026 года было записей: **6**.

queries: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*)::FLOAT / 7)::INTEGER AS avg_per_day FROM events WHERE DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN '2026-05-11' AND '2026-05-17';

case.question: В какой день за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026 было больше всего записей и сколько?

response.answer: Наибольшее количество записей было 11 мая 2026 года — в этот день зафиксировано 40 событий.

queries: SELECT DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM events WHERE occurred_at >= '2026-05-11 00:00:00+03' AND occurred_at < '2026-05-18 00:00:00+03' GROUP BY local_day ORDER BY event_count DESC LIMIT 7

case.question: Сколько раз был стул за всё время?

queries: SELECT COUNT(*) AS stool_count FROM events WHERE type = 'diaper' AND (payload->>'kind') IN ('poo', 'both');

case.question: На прошлой неделе, с 4 мая 2026 по 10 мая 2026, в какой день было больше всего стула и сколько раз?

response.answer: На прошлой неделе больше всего стула было 8 мая 2026 года — в этот день произошло 2 события.

queries: WITH diaper_events AS (SELECT occurred_at, DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day FROM events WHERE type = 'diaper' AND (payload->>'kind') IN ('poo', 'both') AND occurred_at >= '2026-05-04 00:00:00+03' AND occurred_at < '2026-05-11 00:00:00+03'), daily_counts AS (SELECT local_day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM diaper_events GROUP BY local_day ORDER BY count DESC) SELECT * FROM daily_counts LIMIT 1;

case.question: Сколько всего кормлений было, если грудь и бутылочку в пределах 30 минут считать одним кормлением?

response.answer: Всего было 150 кормлений, если грудь и бутылочку в пределах 30 минут считать одним кормлением.

queries: WITH feedings AS (SELECT occurred_at, LAG(occurred_at) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS prev_at FROM events WHERE type IN ('feed_breast', 'feed_bottle')), sessions AS (SELECT occurred_at, SUM(CASE WHEN prev_at IS NULL OR occurred_at - prev_at > INTERVAL '30 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS session_id FROM feedings) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS feeding_count FROM sessions;

case.question: Когда в последний раз кормили грудью?

response.answer: Последнее кормление грудью было в 21:32 по московскому времени (11 мая 2026 года).

queries: SELECT occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow' AS local_time, id FROM events WHERE type = 'feed_breast' ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1

response.answer:
Последние 3 события в дневнике:

queries: SELECT id, occurred_at, type, payload FROM events ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 3

case.question: Сколько всего снов получилось и сколько минут сна суммарно, если считать пробуждением следующую запись после засыпания, а пробуждение без засыпания считать с предыдущей записи?

response.answer: Всего получилось 153 сна, суммарно ребёнок спал 11003 минуты.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type <> 'sleep_start' ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE (p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)), inferred_sleeps AS (SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM start_based_sleeps UNION ALL SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM sleep_end_without_start) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_sleep_count, ROUND(SUM(duration_min))::INTEGER AS total_sleep_minutes FROM inferred_sleeps;

case.question: Если не учитывать обычные записи засыпания, а взять только пробуждения без записанного засыпания, сколько таких дополнительных снов и минут сна получится от предыдущей записи?

response.answer: Всего таких дополнительных снов — 42, а общая длительность сна составляет 3860 минут.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type <> 'sleep_start' ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE (p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)) SELECT COUNT(*) AS additional_sleep_count, ROUND(SUM(duration_min))::INTEGER AS total_additional_minutes FROM sleep_end_without_start;

case.question: В среднем сколько минут сна в день получается по дням, где есть записи сна?

response.answer: В среднем получается 786 минут сна в день по дням, где есть записи сна.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type <> 'sleep_start' ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE (p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)), inferred_sleeps AS (SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM start_based_sleeps UNION ALL SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM sleep_end_without_start), daily AS (SELECT DATE(started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day, SUM(duration_min) AS sleep_minutes FROM inferred_sleeps GROUP BY local_day) SELECT ROUND(AVG(sleep_minutes))::INTEGER AS average_sleep_minutes_per_day FROM daily;

case.question: В среднем сколько минут сна в месяц получается по месяцам, где есть записи сна?

response.answer: В среднем получается 5501 минута сна в месяц по месяцам, где есть записи сна.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type <> 'sleep_start' ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE (p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)), inferred_sleeps AS (SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM start_based_sleeps UNION ALL SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM sleep_end_without_start), monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_month, SUM(duration_min) AS sleep_minutes FROM inferred_sleeps GROUP BY local_month) SELECT ROUND(AVG(sleep_minutes))::INTEGER AS average_sleep_minutes_per_month FROM monthly;
